verdicts.issue: Duplicate of goodfellow2015explaining (same paper, ICLR 2015 / arXiv:1412.6572). Consider deduplicating; vol2 retains both as parallel arXiv-vs-conference entries.

key year 2015 differs from entry year 2014 (year field says 2014 but ICLR 2015; conference paper was published in 2015). Also duplicate of goodfellow2014explaining. The year field should be {2015} to match the ICLR publication and the key.

suggested_fix.note: Update year = {2015} to match key and ICLR publication year. If keeping both arXiv (2014) and ICLR (2015) entries, this is fine; otherwise consolidate.

verdicts.issue: Duplicate of huang2019gpipe (same NeurIPS 2019 paper). Project-name key (gpipe) is acceptable but redundant with author-key entry.
Missing year field (only date = {2023-06}). BibTeX entries should carry an explicit year field for sort/citation correctness.

verdicts.issue: Missing year field (only date = {2022-06-11}). Title is just 'ACT' with subtitle on a separate field; should be merged. Key has no topic word (gupta2022 is generic).

verdicts.issue: Mixed-case key violates project lowercase-key convention (Gupta vs gupta, ChatGPT mid-key). All other keys in this chunk are lowercase.

suggested_fix.note: Lowercase the key. Renaming requires updating every [@Gupta2023ChatGPT] reference in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd.

verdicts.issue: Key/content drift: key prefix says 'harlap2018' but first author is Narayanan (Harlap is second author) and year is 2019 (SOSP). The cited entry is the SOSP 2019 paper, not the 2018 arXiv preprint.

verdicts.issue: Could not verify journal 'Journal of Green Computing' or this article in 2-3 web searches. Generic title, single author 'Michael Harris', no DOI/URL. Possibly fabricated reference.

suggested_fix.note: Manual verification required; if fabricated, remove from bib and audit any citing .qmd.

verdicts.issue: Year=2020 matches arXiv preprint; AAAI 2021 conference proceedings (vol 35, no 8). Mild year drift acceptable per §5 (preprint vs conference within 1 year).
Missing year field (only date = {2020}).

suggested_fix.note: Add year = {2020}.

verdicts.issue: key year 2016 vs entry year 2015 (arXiv preprint year); CVPR was 2016. 1-year preprint/conference gap is silent per §5 but the entry should use year=2016 to match the CVPR booktitle and the key. Also duplicate with he2016resnet.

suggested_fix.note: Update year = {2016} to match CVPR publication and key.

verdicts.issue: SILENT CORRUPTION (per §5): key suggests IEA 2023 Data Centers report, but body content is the Carlson et al. 2022 Nature paper 'Climate change increases cross-species viral transmission risk' (DOI 10.1038/s41586-022-04788-w). All fields (author, title, journal, year, DOI) describe the Carlson paper; only the bib key and a stray 'note = {IEA Global Energy & CO2 Status Report}' suggest the IEA report. Any [@iea2023data] citation will render '(Carlson et al., 2022)'.

suggested_fix.note: Either (a) rename key to carlson2022climate to match the actual content and update all citing .qmd files, or (b) replace entire entry with the real IEA 2023 Data Centers report metadata if that is what citing prose intends. Audit every [@iea2023data] citation in book/quarto/contents/**/*.qmd to determine intended source.

verdicts.issue: Author field is malformed: 'Association, InfiniBand Trade' inverts a corporate name. Should be a braced corporate author: '{InfiniBand Trade Association}'.

verdicts.issue: Missing year field (only date = {2014}). Key contains LaTeX command names ('textquotedblleft'/'textquotedblright') from autogenerated key from title; ungainly and brittle.
